assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and a work or personal email address.
No Snowflake trial account, SnowSQL install, or tutorial objects exist yet.

developer_goal: Create a Snowflake trial account and complete the official introductory hands-on tutorial to first query success.

first_success.outcome: Snowflake in 20 minutes completes through loading sample CSV data and running the final tutorial queries.
first_success.observable_signal: The final DATEADD query returns employee names and calculated dates after earlier COPY and SELECT results succeed.

route_selection.surface: Snowflake self-service trial plus SnowSQL tutorial
route_selection.rule: Prefer the documented Snowflake in 20 minutes route once signup product choice and SnowSQL versus VS Code client are fixed.

candidates.name: Trial signup then Snowflake in 20 minutes with SnowSQL
candidates.reason: This is the classic official introductory tutorial, but current signup surfaces introduce product choices and incomplete step-2 fields.

candidates.name: Trial signup then Snowflake in 20 minutes with VS Code Snowflake extension
candidates.reason: Tutorial notes VS Code users might use the extension instead of SnowSQL, changing install and connect actions.

candidates.name: Snowflake CoCo for Developers versus AI Data Cloud enterprise trial entry
candidates.reason: Public signup marketing presents separate developer and enterprise entry points before the trial form.

required_path.action: Complete the Snowflake trial signup form and select cloud platform, region, and Snowflake Edition.

required_fields.label: Cloud platform, region, and Snowflake Edition
required_fields.notes: Documented for trial signup; exact step-2 public controls beyond the observed first page were not fully captured.

required_path.observable_result: A Snowflake trial account and user exist and welcome or account identifier details are available.

required_path.action: Install SnowSQL for the developer's operating system and connect with account identifier and username.

required_fields.label: SnowSQL install command for selected OS
required_fields.notes: Install steps differ by OS; VS Code alternate remains unresolved.

required_path.observable_result: SnowSQL presents a prompt for the connected session.

required_path.action: Create the tutorial database, table, and X-Small warehouse; stage and load the five sample CSV files; then run the tutorial queries through the final DATEADD statement.

required_fields.label: Tutorial SQL statements and local sample file paths

required_path.observable_result: Tutorial queries return the documented employee and date results.

prerequisites.description: A trial user with privileges to create database, table, and warehouse objects.
Downloaded and unzipped getting-started.zip sample CSV files in the path expected by the tutorial.

unavoidable_waits.description: Snowflake must finish creating the trial account and deliver welcome or account-identifier details before SnowSQL login.

platform_outcomes.description: Trial signup creates an account with free credits for up to 30 days or until balance exhaustion.
COPY INTO loads the five staged CSV files into emp_basic when the warehouse is running.

excluded.item: Converting the trial to a paid account or adding a credit card
excluded.reason: Trial docs state signup needs only a valid email; payment is for post-trial reactivation or conversion.
Cleanup is after the tutorial terminal.

sources.title: Get started
evidence_supported: Entry to Snowflake in 20 minutes tutorial

sources.title: Snowflake Trial signup
evidence_supported: First name, Last name, Work email

uncertainties.question: What exact fields appear on step 2 of the current trial signup form, and which product entry (CoCo versus AI Data Cloud) applies?
uncertainties.impact: Unseen signup fields and product entry points change account-creation actions before the tutorial can start.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Complete dated capture of both signup pages and any post-submit email verification from a fresh trial registration.

uncertainties.question: Should the measured path require SnowSQL or the VS Code Snowflake extension?
uncertainties.impact: Client choice changes install commands and connection steps while aiming at the same SQL terminal.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Select one client and verify the full tutorial from a fresh trial account on one OS.
